description: CompositionBlack and off-white printed top made of knitted polyester blend fabric, has long sleeves, a round neck, a full buttoned placket and waistcoat style layers on the sides at front with a tie-up detailFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this tunic top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, jeans and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
